goal: Build a drawer-open station: Franka pulls open a kitchen-cabinet drawer (prismatic joint along Y axis, ~30cm travel). Validates the articulated-mechanism manipulation pattern needed for fixture-disassembly and inspection workflows.
thoughts: Drawer = parent cabinet body (static) + drawer face (rigid + prismatic-jointed). Joint axis along world Y (drawer pulls toward robot when its base is on +Y side). Joint upper limit = 0.30m travel.
Handle is a small cylinder/cube extruded from drawer face (z=center, x=center, y=front face). Robot grips handle, pulls in -Y direction.

setup_pick_place_controller doesn't natively support drawer-pull motion. This canonical uses a custom 6-waypoint trajectory: approach, grasp_handle, pull_back (joint extends), release. Initial implementation: target_source='spline' with hardcoded waypoints + manual gripper close; later: target_source='curobo' with constraint_phrase='maintain Y-pull while preserving handle grasp'.

Success criterion: drawer joint position >= 0.25m (within 5cm of full open) AND robot wrist within 5cm of nominal release pose. simulate_traversal_check is N/A (no cube delivery); custom validation via joint position read.
Asset: built from primitives (cube body + cube drawer + cylinder handle), no Nucleus dependency. Less faithful than Isaac Lab's Open-Drawer-Franka but unblocks the canonical.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Cabinet body (static)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/Body", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.7, 0.0, 0.40], scale=[0.45, 0.30, 0.40])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/Body", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Drawer face (rigid; prismatic joint to body)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/Drawer", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.55, 0.0, 0.40], scale=[0.05, 0.28, 0.18])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/Drawer", schema_name="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/Drawer", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/Drawer", attr_name="physics:mass", value=2.0)

# Handle protruding from drawer face
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/Drawer/Handle", prim_type="Cylinder", position=[0.50, 0.0, 0.40], scale=[0.02, 0.10, 0.02])

# Prismatic joint between body and drawer (X-axis pull)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/DrawerJoint", prim_type="PhysicsPrismaticJoint")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/DrawerJoint", attr_name="physics:body0", value="/World/Cabinet/Body")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/DrawerJoint", attr_name="physics:body1", value="/World/Cabinet/Drawer")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/DrawerJoint", attr_name="physics:axis", value="X")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/DrawerJoint", attr_name="physics:lowerLimit", value=-0.30)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cabinet/DrawerJoint", attr_name="physics:upperLimit", value=0.0)

# Robot — facing drawer
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
    orientation=[1.0, 0, 0, 0],
)

# Custom waypoint pull (target_source='spline' baseline)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="spline",
    sensor_path="/World/Cabinet/Drawer/Handle",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=["/World/Cabinet/Drawer/Handle"],
    destination_path="/World/Cabinet/Drawer/Handle",
    drop_target_z_offset=0.30,
)
extension_notes: First articulated-manipulation canonical. No cube delivery — success measured via PrismaticJoint position attribute. Currently spline controller with handle-as-source workaround; cuRobo + constraint_phrase upgrade is follow-on work.
failure_modes: PhysicsPrismaticJoint axis convention varies by Isaac Sim version; X may need to be 'Y' or {1,0,0} tuple
Spline controller doesn't know how to pull drawer — hardcoded waypoints would drag in absolute world space, but the handle moves with the drawer → motion plan diverges
Mass too low → drawer flies open from light contact; mass too high → robot wrist torque saturates
Sensor=handle path treats handle as movable cube — pick-place controller may try to LIFT handle vertically instead of pulling horizontally
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; build OK, gate stable_fail (pick-place controller cannot drive PrismaticJoint; needs constraint-aware controller)
